gems.title: 真爱留声
gems.summary: 年轻女子给已故姐姐发送的搞笑自白语音留言无意中被转给了陌生人，而这个陌生人竟隔着遥远的距离爱上了她。
gems.summaryEn: A young woman's hilariously confessional voicemails to her late sister are unknowingly redirected to a stranger, who begins to fall in love from afar.
gems.whyWatch: 用笑声包裹的思念，隔着电波也能被爱听见。
gems.whyWatchEn: A heartfelt comedy where grief meets connection through accidental voicemails, proving love can transcend distance and loss.
gems.audience: 喜欢轻松浪漫、带点治愈和幽默的观众，尤其适合对“错过与重逢”题材有共鸣的人。
gems.audienceEn: Fans of lighthearted romantic comedies with emotional depth, and anyone who enjoys stories about unexpected connections and healing through humor.
